$comment: Repo-local config for the spec/dev/qa board sweeps. Copy to <target-repo>/.claude/linear-sweep.json and fill in. Nothing in the skills is hardcoded — they read this file.
projectId: <project uuid — get it from: node scripts/linear.mjs ensure-project "<team>" "<project>">
issuePrefix: <team key used in card ids, e.g. COD>
repos: <repo folder name(s) the sweeps may touch>
$comment_runtime: Scheduled sweep runtime selection. Prefer runtimes.<sweep> for per-stage dispatch. Legacy runtime + models remain as a fallback when runtimes.<sweep> is absent. The review entry is a reviewer role preference for sweep instructions, not a scheduled stage.
$comment_parallel: Optional. maxNonShipDispatches defaults to 2, so the launcher can run a bounded pair of non-ship sweeps in one pass when their resolved repo paths do not overlap. maxDrainPasses defaults to 5 and is clamped to 1..5, so a tick can re-check queues up to four times after dispatched passes. Set maxNonShipDispatches or maxDrainPasses to 1 for stricter serial/one-pass mode; ship-sweep always stays serial.
$comment_reviewLenses: Optional. Card-type gating for review lenses: a card carrying any of a lens's labels fires that lens (design at spec+qa, devex at spec, security at spec+dev+ship, perf at dev/qa, research at spec). Omit the whole block to run only the always-on lenses (eng-review, code-review, /qa). setup-team creates these labels; sweeps auto-apply them to unlabelled cards (generate-if-missing).
$comment_requireShipApproval: Optional (default false). When true, ship-sweep requires a human-applied `ship:approved` label in addition to the card being in 'Ready to Ship' before it will merge — a second deliberate act that hardens against an accidental bulk-drag. (The single-runner ship pin lives in the launcher registry: `node scripts/linear-watch.mjs ship-runner on`.)
$comment_fastPath: Enabled by default. Dev-sweep may mark tiny, high-confidence, low-risk changes with `fast-path:eligible`; a human can then move the card from In Review directly to Ready to Ship to skip QA Passed. Set enabled to false to require normal QA Passed for every card. ship-sweep still merges only from human-moved Ready to Ship.

canonicalDocs.$comment: Single-repo projects can point architecture at CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md and leave schema null. Multi-repo setups name a canonical schema.md/architecture.md pair.

deploy: <how this project reaches production — e.g. 'Vercel auto-deploys on push to main; some changes need a Vercel env var, a DB migration applied, or a platform CLI deploy'>
credentialsNote: <where app + tooling secrets live — e.g. '.env.local for app secrets; Linear key in gitignored .env'>
